message:
chore(beads): file hbu5d — triage/claim mismatch blocks ready dispatch

bv --robot-triage recommends coding_agent_session_search-72sq9 as unclaimed
top-pick P0 but br update --status in_progress refuses it because
72sq9 is a parent-child child of ibuuh.32 which is blocked by ibuuh.31.
Same refusal pattern on every open P0/P1 I tried this cycle (2uotv,
ibuuh.34, .37, .35, .11, .7, .9, .3, .10, .6, .19, .23, .24, tin8o,
a9698, qhyyq, zbu32). Surfaced as bug coding_agent_session_search-hbu5d
so the triage/claim contract gets reconciled — either triage should
exclude parent-child-to-blocked items or br update should allow child
claim when the parent is still in planning.

No source changes; beads-only commit to persist the new bug and
unblock the next agent's dispatch loop decision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
